Video.summary: Catch the exhilarating Men's Pro Doubles match from the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships, powered by Margaritaville! Witness incredible action on the Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida, the paradise coast for pickleball. This thrilling match features the dynamic duo of John Cangelosi and Michael Leonard against their formidable opponents. Get ready for intense rallies, powerful shots, and strategic play from top professional pickleball players. Don't miss this must-watch event from the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart
US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart
US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart

Video.summary: Day 7 of the World Pickleball League brings a critical and dramatic game between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Bengaluru Jawans. The game begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match featuring Mumbai's American star Brandon Lane against Bengaluru's Jack Foster. The match lives up to the hype, showcasing fierce action.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Video.summary: Step into the electric Jio World Garden in Mumbai for a high-stakes showdown where the road to the playoffs is on the line. Delhi Dilwale enter this tie in second place, looking to solidify their dominance and secure a "Q" next to their name for a guaranteed spot in the semifinals. On the other side, Pune United are fighting for survival, desperately needing a win after finally breaking their season-long drought earlier in the day. Witness intense matchups as tactical veterans like Trang Huynh and Max Mansoor face off against Pune's resilient stars, including the grit of Katie Morris and the power of William Sobeck. In a league where every rally counts toward the "Band of Honor," these athletes must battle both their opponents and the relentless 15-minute clock in a masterclass of professional pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2

Video.summary: Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim take on Dave Weinbach & Mari Humberg in this Mixed Pro Split Age Semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal

Video.summary: This Pro Women's Doubles match at the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships features the dynamic team of Anna Leigh Waters and Lee Waters facing off against the formidable duo of Walczak and Harris. The Waters team, known for their aggressive play and powerful shots, including Anna Leigh's unique heavy topspin cross-court backhand roll, aim to dominate the court. Walczak, a native of Poland with collegiate tennis experience, and Harris seek to overcome the Waters' early lead and challenge their expected path to the Championship court.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris

Video.summary: Freddie Powell and Louis Laville take on Wesley Jackson and Bernie Audibert in this critical Men’s Doubles Semifinal from the 2023 English Nationals. With a spot in the championship round on the line, both teams bring their A-game—mixing sharp shot selection, strategic court positioning, and high-pressure execution. Watch as these top British players battle through tight rallies and momentum swings in a must-see semifinal clash.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert

Video.summary: Parris Todd and Simone Jardim battles against Alix Truong and Milan Rane in the Women's Pro Doubles Semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: Live from The Picklr in Noblesville, this NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 matchup features a critical battle between the University of Wisconsin-Madison and Purdue University. With eight national bids and $5,000 in prize money on the line, the stakes are high as the 16th-seeded Purdue takes on the 17th-seeded Wisconsin in a best-of-seven format.The match kicks off with Gender Doubles, where Wisconsin’s duo of Noah and Sarah Sowinski showcase dominant net play and quick hands against Purdue’s Caleb Yang and Trevor Ju. Watch for standout moments, including an incredible Ernie from Wisconsin and strategic adjustments in the Mixed Doubles games involving Colton Thielman and Elena Schlichte.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue

Video.summary: The Naples JBB United face off against the Boca Raton Picklers in a women's match.
Video.title: NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Mens)

Image.alt: NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Mens)
NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Mens)
NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Mens)

Video.summary: In the exciting championship match of Picklebowl 2023, pro pickleball player Kyle Yates teams up with Picklebowl host and former NFL quarterback Danny Wuerffel to challenge the fierce duo of Anna Bright, a top female pro and former collegiate tennis star, and Ameen Hafez. This charity event brings together athletes and celebrities representing their alma maters in a competitive battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Dave Fleming and special guest Marcellus Wiley highlights the skill, strategy, and drama on court. Watch intense rallies, strategic plays, and hear insider insights as these top players compete for the title. Don’t miss the dynamic energy and social spirit of pickleball in this must-see final.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez

Video.summary: Sheri Courter and Christine Karges take on Diane Wainio and Karin Kochis in this Women's Senior Pro Backdraw Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Match

Video.summary: Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim take on Lee Whitwell and Andrei Daescu in this Mixed Pro Split Age Gold Medal Match.

Video.summary: Get the behind-the-scenes look of the pickleball court construction process with the Court Kings crew Lonnie "Hurricane" Anger, Alex "Mufasa" Lanzetta, Paul "Gucci" Roschfska and Jerry "Cruise" Duncan.
Video.title: Court Kings - Part 1

Image.alt: Court Kings - Part 1
Court Kings - Part 1
Court Kings - Part 1

Video.summary: Championship Court hosts a star-studded final as brothers Ben and Collin Johns take on Matt Wright and Riley Newman in this Men’s Pro Doubles finale. Packed with elite strategy, blistering hand battles, and dramatic swings, this is top-tier pickleball at its most intense.
Video.title: US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman

Image.alt: US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman
US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman
US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman

Video.summary: In this US Open 2025 Pro Women's Doubles match, the Waters duo (Anna Lee Waters and Lee Waters) take on Amanda Rosati and Kaitlyn Campbell. The commentators highlight the Waters' dominant performance, particularly Anna Lee's disguised shots and aggressive play, as they secure a swift victory. They also discuss the challenges of the progressive draw format in pickleball and preview Anna Lee Waters' upcoming mixed doubles match with Andre Agassi.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell

Video.summary: Get ready for thrilling Pro Men's Doubles pickleball action from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships at East Naples Community Park, the National Pickleball Center! This semi-final match features the dynamic duo of Richard Livornese Jr. and Ryler Deheart against the formidable team of Ben Newell and Brandon Lane. Witness incredible rallies, aggressive plays, and strategic dinks as these top players battle it out for a spot in Championship Saturday. Don't miss this high-energy competition from the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell

Video.summary: Welcome to Week 3, Day 1 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025, live from the Barnes Tennis Center in the heart of San Diego, California. This highly anticipated state rivalry pits the UCLA Bruins against the SDSU Aztecs in a crucial best-of-seven collegiate team match.The match format prioritizes singles, with UCLA winning the coin toss and opting to start with Women's Singles. The broadcast features the Women's Singles match between Mae Lee (UCLA) and Emily Miller (SDSU), and the Men's Singles where SDSU's Preston Lynch takes a commanding early lead. The match also includes Gender Doubles, where SDSU (the Aztecs) took an early 3-0 lead in the overall match score. The winner of this pool play match gains a strong position for seeding, moving closer to securing one of the National Championship bids.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach, this Week 3, Day 2 matchup of the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 features Liberty University facing Carnegie Mellon University. Liberty enters the match strong, having already secured wins in women's doubles. The broadcast highlights the Men's Doubles game where Liberty's Derek Kraje and Ben Rice dominate with a 11-6 victory, utilizing aggressive net play and strategic resets.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon

Video.summary: October 28, 2023 - It's the English Nationals Open in the Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. Teams face off to compete for victory!
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3
English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3
English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3

Video.summary: It's Super Sunday on Day 3 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Game Number Five pits the Chennai Super Champs against the Delhi team (Dilwale) at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai. The stakes are incredibly high as teams battle for the final semi-final spots.The action starts with the First Mixed Doubles match, featuring Chennai's coach, the legendary pro Joey Farias, teaming up with Anna Clarice. They face the formidable duo of Delhi's Willie Chung and Lauren Mercado. The match is a tactical masterclass, with Willie Chung noted for his consistent, pro-level reset game and Farias praised for his on-court intelligence.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues its high-energy opening day at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a star-studded clash between Delhi Dilwale and the Chennai Super Champs. Watch as international stars like Delhi’s Max "Purple Jesus" Manthao and Chennai’s Hwang Nam Lee—a former Wimbledon junior doubles champion—bring world-class precision to the court. With celebrity co-owner Samantha cheering from the sidelines and strategic masterclasses from coach Wesley Gabrielsson, this tie features a gauntlet of intense Women’s Singles, Men's Singles, and high-speed Doubles matches. Experience every "Ernie" shot, tactical "pickle play," and the longest video challenge in league history as these two powerhouse teams battle for early-season dominance.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Video.summary: The US Open took place April 24-30, 2022 in Naples, FL. The Women's Doubles Final was a match up of Catherine Parenteau & Lea Jansen vs. Irina Tereschenko & Andrea Koop.
